Business Manager FAQs
Understanding Business Manager
Business Manager FAQs
Does my client need a Business Manager
in order for me to access their ad
account?
No, you are essentially requesting access to their Ad Account and they do not need a
business manager for you to do this.
How come I can't add in my client's
payment method?
You need to be an Admin of their Ad Account in order to add Payment details. If you
are only assigned as an advertiser you will need to get them to add in their own credit
card or payment details.
How do I share a pixel with different
business managers?
[Advanced] If you need to share a pixel to a different business manager (change of
agency, new ad accounts etc), simply click on the Pixel tab from the hamburger in
Business Manager Settings, then click on the pixel in question and select 'Assign
Partner". From there enter the Business Manager ID.
How do I explain to my clients how to
add in their payment details or find their
ad account ID?
Send them this link: https://www.dropbox.com/s/emj96z02pav0x17
